name: Chick Pea Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup dry chick peas, cooked (about 2 1/2 cups)
1 large carrot, grated or cut into fine matchsticks
1/4 teaspoon dried basil (or 1 rounded tablespoon fresh, minced)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the yogurt, vinegar, and basil in a bowl.
2. Stir together until well mixed.
3. Add the cooked chick peas, sliced green onions, grated carrot, and minced parsley to the bowl with the yogurt mixture.
4. Mix until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
5. Chill several hours before serving.
6. This salad pairs well with dark green dishes like spinach soup or broccoli and noodles, or it can be stuffed into a pita bread lined with spinach leaves.
Cheap, easy, doubles or triples well, freezes badly but can be made ahead and lasts several days in the fridge.
